When Marlci is hurt, he is said to harm the Gandharvas,

164 Bjhat Samhitn
Gods, demons, spells, herbs, angels, Yaksas, Nagas and Vidyadha-
ras. Vasi§tha, when hurt, proves harmful to the Sakas, Yavanas,
Daradas, Paratas, Kambojas, hermits and those living in forests;
when radiant, he bestows prosperity. Scholars, intelligent men and
Brahmins are mentioned as belonging to the domain of Ahgiras;
and foresters, aquatic products, the ocean and rivers are assigned to
Atri. Giants, devils, demons, Daityas and serpents are said to
belong to Pulastya; roots and fruits to Pulaha; and sacrifices and
sacrificers to Kratu.
[In these verses different classes of beings, tribes and articles
are mentioned as coming under the influence of the Seven Sages.
For a detailed treatment of geographical jurisdiction of the planets,
